evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establish data quality standards using tests, CI/CD, and documentation.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Partner with Data Engineering to diagnose issues and optimize warehouse performance.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and maintain core dbt models representing business areas like customers, revenue, and operations.

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Establish data quality standards using tests, CI/CD, and documentation.
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: The responsibilities emphasize data quality standards, testing infrastructure, and documentation as core professional expectations, with accuracy and maintainability repeated as explicit priorities.
domain_risk_reasoning: Revenue is mentioned as a core analytics domain within an energy-trading sector, but the JD lacks explicit financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory language despite the high-risk industry context.
data_team_maturity_quote: Partner with Data Engineering to diagnose issues and optimize warehouse performance.
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Established Data Engineering team, named tools in active use (dbt, Omni), and optimization work indicate a maturing function with infrastructure in place, not greenfield startup.
jd_authorship_quote: Design and maintain core dbt models representing business areas like customers, revenue, and operations.
jd_authorship_reasoning: The responsibilities include specific technical context (named tools, business domains) suggesting hiring manager input, but also generic phrasing and boilerplate verbs (design, maintain, lead) indicating recruiter involvement.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Define and implement company metrics in Omni for self-serve analytics.
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The primary responsibility centers on enabling self-serve analytics for internal data consumers, positioning the role as analytics platform enabler rather than serving commercial or finance teams.
autonomy_level_quote: Define and implement company metrics in Omni for self-serve analytics.
autonomy_level_reasoning: This responsibility demonstrates both strategic direction-setting (define metrics and standards) and hands-on execution, reinforced by 'hands-on, individual contributor' combined with 'set direction for analytics patterns' expectations.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design and maintain core dbt models representing business areas like customers, revenue, and operations.
ai_role_reasoning: No AI tools, enablement responsibilities, or infrastructure readiness signals.
testing_framing_quote: Establish data quality standards using tests, CI/CD, and documentation
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns quality standards establishment with tests as core practice.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Partner with Data Engineering to diagnose issues and optimize warehouse performance
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Operational reliability concern (issue diagnosis, performance tuning) without regulatory or compliance framing.
